no: Interjections, mini-quests, bank pack AT_INTERACTIVE_EXIT patched to prevent PDF popups during automated install.
sum: BG2 quest mod with 5 components adding encounters with heroes, thieves, and merchants. Varied content from combat to social interactions.

co.n: Component 1. Interjections & Mini-quests (by Austin & Arcanecoast Team)
co.tp2n: Component 1. Interjections & Mini-quests (by Austin & Arcanecoast Team)
co.no: NPC interjections and mini-quests adding flavor.

co.n: Component 2. First Calimport Bank Pack (by Scheele & Austin & Arcanecoast Team)
co.tp2n: Component 2. First Calimport Bank Pack (by Scheele & Austin & Arcanecoast Team)
co.no: First Calimport Bank with banking and investment mechanics.

co.n: Component 3. Shadow-Covered Love & Death (by Alisia & Austin)
co.tp2n: Component 3. Shadow-Covered Love & Death (by Alisia & Austin)
co.no: Shadow-Covered Love and Death: romance-tinged murder mystery.

co.n: Component 4. The Missing Troll Case (by Alisia & Austin)
co.tp2n: Component 4. The Missing Troll Case (by Alisia & Austin)
co.no: The Missing Troll Case: an investigation quest.

co.n: Component 5. Unlocked original dialogs of all NPC (by Tipun & Austin)
co.tp2n: Component 5. Unlocked original dialogs of all NPC (by Tipun & Austin)
